title: Java packages should have a 'package-info.java' file with javadoc
description: Each package in a Java project should include a package-info.java file. The purpose of this file is to document the Java package using javadoc and declare package annotations.
recommendation: Create a package-info.java file with javadoc and package annotations.

checks.message: Create a package-info.java file with javadoc and package annotations.
